subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who is supplicating God! Beseech God that you may attain the good pleasure of the Blessed Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مبتهل الی الله از خدا بخواه که برضای جمال مبارک موفق و موید گردی و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @unity in diversity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
